'''Glasfir'a'lik''', called '''Glasfir''' for short, was a [[Defel/Legends|Defel]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] who effectively controlled the planet [[Demesel/Legends|Demesel]].

==History==
Glasfir first came to [[Demesel/Legends|Demesel]] while under the employ of [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lords]]. Feeling betrayed by his masters over a payment dispute, Glasfir engaged on a three-[[Standard year/Legends|year]] campaign of revenge against every Hutt agent on Demesel. Soon, he was one of the most powerful and feared criminals on the planet, and since his former employers had posted a 60,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on his head, Glasfir had little recourse but to stay on Demesel. Within a few [[Standard month/Legends|months]], he had eliminated or frightened away all serious competition, and came to rule Demesel's underworld.<ref name="GG11" />

Crime skyrocketed on Demesel, and the local authorities' attempts to subvert his organization failed. Glasfir used terror tactics to decrease the populace's faith in their government, and gave the [[Thalassian slavers/Legends|Thalassian Slavers' Guild]] safe harbor at Demesel.<ref name="GG11" />

==Reputation==
Since Defel were so rare in the galaxy that average citizens had usually never even heard of them, Glasfir became notorious on Demesel for his brutal nature and mysterious abilities. Superstitions arose around the "monster" who ruled Demesel's underground; in reality, Glasfir was little more than a petty thug who used bullying and his species' uniqueness to his advantage.
